name: Tart Lemon Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the lemon rind to the butter and cream until well combined.
2. Gradually add part of the sugar, blending after each addition.
3. Continue adding remaining sugar, alternating with lemon juice, until the frosting reaches a consistency suitable for spreading.
4. Beat thoroughly after each addition.
5. Stir in the salt.
6. Makes enough frosting to cover the top of one layer and sides of three 9-inch layers.
